name: garden
description: Apply and check the GARDEN agent-first software design principles in Codex and Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Agent-first architecture, review, and deterministic checks
interface.longDescription: Bootstrap or retrofit projects around the GARDEN principles, review changes through six evidence-based lenses, and run deterministic structure checks through hooks and local tools.
defaultPrompt: Audit this repository against the GARDEN checklist.
Review this change through the GARDEN lenses.
Bootstrap this project with GARDEN structure and gates.
